hero.headline: Where science sees beyond the skin
hero.subtitle: Clinical, surgical and aesthetic dermatology with diagnostic imaging in the heart of Florianopolis

impact.phrase: A new concept in dermatological care

about.label: About UNA
about.title: Science, technology and care in one place
about.paragraph_1: UNA Dermatologia was born from a conviction: modern dermatology demands more than trained eyes. It demands diagnostic imaging technology, a multidisciplinary team and a commitment to scientific evidence.
about.paragraph_2: Founded in 2023 by Dr. Ariel Cordova Rosa, the clinic brings together dermatologists, a radiologist and a nurse in a welcoming and elegant space in downtown Florianopolis.
about.paragraph_3: Here, every consultation is a meeting between scientific rigor and genuine attention. Because your skin deserves to be understood, not just treated.
about.mission: To care for skin health comprehensively with evidence-based treatments.
about.vision: To be a reference in modern, humanized dermatology in Santa Catarina.

team.label: Team
team.title: Professionals who make the difference
team.subtitle: A multidisciplinary team dedicated to the comprehensive care of your skin

services.label: Services
services.title: Areas of expertise
services.subtitle: Complete care for the health and beauty of your skin
services.clinica_desc: Diagnosis, prevention and treatment of skin, hair and nail conditions with an evidence-based approach.
services.cirurgica_desc: Dermatological surgical procedures with precise technique and attention to aesthetic outcomes.
services.estetica_desc: Advanced aesthetic treatments with cutting-edge technologies for rejuvenation and facial harmonization.
services.diagnostico_desc: Dermatological ultrasound and digital dermoscopy for more accurate and early diagnoses.

technology.label: Our Edge
technology.title: Seeing beyond the surface
technology.subtitle: We are one of the few clinics in Florianopolis with in-house dermatological ultrasound
technology.paragraph_1: While most dermatology clinics rely solely on visual observation, UNA has a specialized radiologist as a permanent team member.
technology.paragraph_2: Dermatological ultrasound allows visualization of skin layers in high resolution, aiding in lesion diagnosis, surgical planning and treatment monitoring.
technology.paragraph_3: This integration between dermatology and radiology is rare and represents the future of dermatological diagnosis.

space.label: Our space
space.title: Welcoming and elegant, in the heart of Florianopolis
space.paragraph: Located at Edificio Estacao Milano, next to Patio Milano, UNA was designed to offer comfort and privacy in every consultation. An environment that reflects our commitment to excellence.

location.label: Location
location.title: How to find us
location.address: Ed. Estacao Milano, R. Angelo La Porta, 53 - room 904

cta_final.title: Your skin has a story
cta_final.subtitle: Let us read it together. Book your appointment and discover a new concept in dermatological care.
